title: nephrolepis preussneri
intro: Nephrolepis preussneri, also known as the West African Lady's fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nephrolepis preussneri include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a treatment for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical treatments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
